global.title: Something went wrong.
global.body: The workspace hit an unexpected problem. Try again, or return to a stable page.

metadata.title: Settings
metadata.description: Manage the appearance and AI provider for your workspace.

integrations.title: Connected Services
integrations.description: Connect third-party services to sync data into Princeps.
integrations.errorDisconnect: Failed to disconnect. Please try again.

subscription.title: Plan & Subscription
subscription.description: Manage your current plan and billing.
subscription.manageDescription: Update payment method, view invoices, or cancel your subscription.
subscription.upgradeDescription: Unlock more features and higher limits.
subscription.error: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.
subscription.portalError: Failed to open billing portal. Please try again.

appearance.themeDescription: Choose between light, dark, or system-based theme.
appearance.languageDescription: Choose the display language for your workspace.
appearance.locationDescription: Choose your city for accurate weather display.
appearance.timezoneDescription: Choose your timezone — affects weather and daily greetings.
appearance.notificationsDescription: Receive a daily personal greeting from your assistant.
appearance.notificationsDisclaimer: Greetings use your monthly token quota.

provider.title: Active AI Provider
provider.description: Connection status for the configured LLM provider.

usage.title: Usage & Quotas
usage.description: Your current plan usage for this billing period.
usage.chatsNote: This limit never resets — delete chats to free up space.
usage.toolCallsNote: Tool call input/output is included in your approximate token count above.
usage.knowledgeCharsNote: Cumulative character count of all processed uploads — does not decrease on delete.
usage.prepPackNote: AI-generated prep packs this calendar month.
usage.briefingNote: AI-generated daily briefings (manual regeneration) this calendar month. The automatic cron briefing does not count.
usage.memoryNote: Number of memory facts currently stored.
usage.budgetNoteBody: Token counting is approximate and serves as a budget proxy, not exact cost tracking. It is possible to exhaust your monthly token budget while still having LLM calls remaining — those remaining calls cannot be used until the token budget resets next month.

tools.title: AI Tools
tools.description: Choose which capabilities your assistant can use.

assistant.pageDescription: Personalize how your assistant looks, speaks, and interacts with you.
assistant.nameDescription: Give your assistant a name you'd like to use.
assistant.toneDescription: Choose the communication style of your assistant.
assistant.addressDescription: Choose how your assistant refers to you in conversation.
assistant.lengthDescription: Set the preferred verbosity of assistant responses.
assistant.proactivityDescription: How often the assistant proactively offers suggestions and follow-ups.
assistant.reloginNotice: Some changes (e.g. assistant name in the chat widget) take effect after your next login.
assistant.customPromptDescription: Extends the settings above with free-form instructions. What you write here is layered on top of your tone, address, and response-length preferences. Supports Markdown.
assistant.customPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Always respond in bullet points. Never suggest meetings on Fridays.
assistant.autoBriefingDescription: Generate your daily briefing automatically every morning.
assistant.reportsDescription: Generate a report after each assistant tool interaction.

sidebar.title: Chats
sidebar.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this chat and all its messages.
sidebar.limitReached: Delete a chat to create a new one.
sidebar.pendingEmpty: Start chatting first — empty chats are not saved.

error.providerUnavailable: AI provider is not available or not configured.
error.send: Failed to send message. Please try again.

settings.title: Chat Settings
settings.description: These settings apply to all AI providers.
settings.temperatureDescription: Controls randomness. Lower = more focused, higher = more creative.
settings.timeoutDescription: Maximum time to wait for a response (in seconds).

deleteDialog.title: Delete this label?

tools.title: Available Tools
tools.description: Phrases you can say to the assistant to trigger each capability.

create_task.label: Create Task
create_task.what: Creates a new task with optional priority, due date, and labels.
create_task.example: "Add a task: review the Q2 report, high priority, due Friday"

list_tasks.label: List Tasks
list_tasks.what: Retrieves your tasks, optionally filtered by status.
list_tasks.example: "What tasks do I have open?" or "Show me all urgent tasks"

complete_task.label: Complete Task
complete_task.example: "Mark the Q2 report task as done"

update_task.label: Update Task
update_task.what: Changes a task's title, notes, priority, due date, status, or labels.
update_task.example: "Change the report task to urgent and move the due date to Monday"

delete_task.label: Delete Task
delete_task.what: Permanently deletes a task. The assistant will ask for confirmation before proceeding.

create_label.label: Create Label
create_label.what: Creates a new global label with an optional color.
create_label.example: "Create a label called Work in blue"

update_label.label: Update Label
update_label.what: Renames or recolors an existing label.

delete_label.label: Delete Label
delete_label.what: Deletes a label and removes it from all attached records.

get_user_info.label: Get My Info
get_user_info.what: Returns your profile details: name, email, plan, timezone, and member since date.
get_user_info.example: "What plan am I on?" or "Show me my profile info"

create_contact.label: Create Contact
create_contact.what: Creates a new contact with optional role, company, email, phone, notes, and labels.
create_contact.example: "Add a contact: Jane Doe, CEO at Acme, jane@acme.com"

list_contacts.label: List Contacts
list_contacts.what: Retrieves all your contacts with their details and IDs.
list_contacts.example: "Show me all my contacts" or "Who are my contacts?"

update_contact.label: Update Contact
update_contact.what: Updates an existing contact's details or labels.

create_meeting.label: Create Meeting
create_meeting.what: Schedules a new meeting with optional duration, location, and labels.
create_meeting.example: "Schedule a meeting: Q2 review, tomorrow at 2pm, 60 minutes"

list_meetings.label: List Meetings
list_meetings.what: Retrieves your meetings, optionally filtered by status.
list_meetings.example: "What meetings do I have coming up?" or "Show me all my meetings"

update_meeting.label: Update Meeting
update_meeting.what: Changes a meeting's title, time, duration, location, status, or labels.
update_meeting.example: "Move the Q2 review to Friday at 3pm"

generate_meeting_prep_pack.label: Generate Meeting Prep Pack
generate_meeting_prep_pack.what: Creates a structured AI briefing for a meeting: goal, key context, participants, open items, talking points, and questions to resolve.
generate_meeting_prep_pack.example: "Prepare me for the Q2 review meeting"

get_meeting_prep_pack.label: Read Meeting Prep Pack
get_meeting_prep_pack.what: Returns the current prep pack content for a specific meeting.
get_meeting_prep_pack.example: "Show me the prep pack for the Q2 review"

clear_meeting_prep_pack.label: Clear Meeting Prep Pack
clear_meeting_prep_pack.what: Deletes the stored prep pack for a meeting.
clear_meeting_prep_pack.example: "Clear the prep pack for the Q2 review"

update_meeting_prep_pack.label: Edit Meeting Prep Pack
update_meeting_prep_pack.what: Manually edits the content of an existing prep pack — e.g. to add a note or correct a section.
update_meeting_prep_pack.example: "Add a note about the open budget item to my Q2 review prep pack"

create_decision.label: Record Decision
create_decision.what: Logs a new decision with optional rationale, outcome, and status.
create_decision.example: "Record a decision: migrate to Postgres, status decided"

list_decisions.label: List Decisions
list_decisions.what: Retrieves your decisions, optionally filtered by status.
list_decisions.example: "What decisions are still open?" or "Show me all my decisions"

update_decision.label: Update Decision
update_decision.what: Changes a decision's title, rationale, outcome, status, or labels.
update_decision.example: "Mark the Postgres migration decision as decided"

create_goal.label: Create Goal
create_goal.what: Creates a new goal with optional description, status, target date, labels, and milestones.
create_goal.example: "Set a goal: launch the beta by June, with milestones for design and development"

list_goals.label: List Goals
list_goals.what: Retrieves your goals, optionally filtered by status.
list_goals.example: "What goals do I have open?" or "Show me all my goals"

update_goal.label: Update Goal
update_goal.what: Changes a goal's title, description, status, target date, or labels.
update_goal.example: "Mark my launch goal as in progress"

delete_goal.label: Delete Goal
delete_goal.what: Permanently deletes a goal and all its milestones.

add_goal_milestone.label: Add Goal Milestone
add_goal_milestone.what: Adds a new milestone checkpoint to an existing goal.
add_goal_milestone.example: "Add a milestone 'design complete' to my launch goal"

complete_goal_milestone.label: Complete Goal Milestone
complete_goal_milestone.what: Marks a goal milestone as completed or uncompleted.
complete_goal_milestone.example: "Mark the design complete milestone as done"

search_knowledge.label: Search Knowledge
search_knowledge.what: Searches your personal knowledge base using semantic similarity to find relevant excerpts from uploaded documents.
search_knowledge.example: "What does my onboarding document say about vacation policy?"

remember_fact.label: Remember Fact
remember_fact.what: Saves a key–value fact to your personal memory so the assistant can recall it in future conversations.
remember_fact.example: "Remember that my preferred meeting time is 10am"

recall_facts.label: Recall Facts
recall_facts.what: Retrieves all facts stored in your personal memory.
recall_facts.example: "What do you know about me?" or "What have I told you to remember?"

forget_fact.label: Forget Fact
forget_fact.what: Permanently deletes a stored memory fact by its ID.
forget_fact.example: "Forget that fact about my meeting time"

get_briefing.label: Get Briefing
get_briefing.what: Reads your current daily executive briefing.
get_briefing.example: "Show me my daily briefing" or "What's my briefing for today?"

regenerate_briefing.label: Regenerate Briefing
regenerate_briefing.what: Generates a fresh daily briefing from your tasks, meetings, and decisions.
regenerate_briefing.example: "Regenerate my briefing" or "Create a new daily summary"

knowledge.uploadLimitError: Plan limit reached. Delete documents or upgrade your plan.

deleteDialog.title: Delete document?
deleteDialog.description: “{name}” and all its text chunks will be permanently deleted. The processed character count will remain in your quota.

reports.emptyHint: Reports appear here after your assistant uses tools.

briefings.empty: No briefing yet. Generate your first daily briefing.
briefings.generateError: Failed to generate briefing. Please try again.
briefings.autoOffHint: Your briefing won't be generated automatically. You can still generate it here or ask your assistant.
